results.command: bash -lc 'log="$OUT/baseline-server.log"; "$SERVER" --port "$PORT" --mode strict > "$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for i in {1..100}; do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --clients 50 --requests 500000 --pipeline 16 --workload set --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/baseline-set-p16-last.json" --key-prefix cod-pass43-baseline'
